title: Codereview pass 3: TcpServer init - removed dead code
description:
Pass 3 reviewed the method removal:

**Finding: Cleanup is appropriate**

The _handle_client method was removed from TcpServer class because:
1. It was only used by serve() function
2. The fix moved this logic to a local closure
3. No other code references TcpServer._handle_client

Verified via grep that no external code calls _handle_client. The method was private (underscore prefix) so this is not a breaking API change.

The fix follows the codebase guideline: 'Remove imports/variables/functions that YOUR changes made unused.'

No bugs found in this pass.
